item.title: XML sitemap
item.intent: The site must generate a valid XML sitemap at /sitemap.xml covering all pages and content so search engines can discover and index every page.
item.description: Install @astrojs/sitemap, add it to astro.config.mjs integrations, set the site URL. The integration auto-discovers all routes.
steps: Add the sitemap integration to astro.config.mjs integrations array
Ensure site URL is set in astro.config.mjs (required for sitemap generation)
Build and verify sitemap files are generated in dist/

acceptanceCriteria.text: Sitemap is generated at build time
acceptanceCriteria.verify: npm run build && (test -f dist/sitemap-index.xml || test -f dist/sitemap-0.xml || test -f dist/sitemap.xml)
